<<code language="ocaml" | (Conf : PAGE_TRANSITION_CONF) ->
  sig
    type screenshot = Conf.screenshot
    val install_global_handler :
      ?transition_duration:float ->
      take_screenshot:((Page_transition.Make.screenshot -> unit) -> unit) ->
      animation_type:(Eliom.Client.changepage_event ->
                      Page_transition.animation) ->
      unit
  end >>
